contributor: university of illinois at urbana-champaign library, urbana, il
description: MAY DAY IN THE SOVIET UNION WILL CELEBRATE THE VICTORIOUS UPBUILDING OF SOCIALISM Hundreds of thousands of workers children in the United States are starving to death Over 5000000 child laborers are shattering their health to produce profits for the bosses Bxit in the Soviet Union above photograph scientific homes for the care and health of the workers children are maintained Demonstrate May Day For The Defense Os The Soviet Union Friends of Soviet Union Issues Call to All Workers in U S A To All Workingmen and Women To AN Friends of the Soviet Union First of May the holiday of the workers throughout the world the day on which the workers demon strate their strength and protest against the capitalist system of ex ploitationMay First 1930 takes on an added significance It is not only a day of promise for the work ing class but a day of great achievement of the Soviet workers and peasants The great success of the Five Year Plan of socialist construction translates into actual concrete fact the aims and ideals of May First These aims and ideals have been surpassed by remarkable economic and cultural advances in the First Workers Republic New
